nasb.text: So all the congregation brought him outside the camp and stoned him to death with stones, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And all the congregation brought him outside the camp and stoned him to death with stones, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 於是全體會眾把他拉出營外，用石頭把他打死，正如耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 于是，全体会众照耶和华对摩西的吩咐，把他拉到营外，用石头打死了他。
